original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Emma, Joseph, Penelope, and David. According to Emma, "If Joseph is a knave then Joseph is a knight". Joseph noted, "Penelope is a knight and Joseph is a knight". "Emma is a knave or David is a knave" - Penelope. David expressed that Emma is a knight or Joseph is a knave. So who is a knight and who is a knave?
